performanceEvidence.reason: Node fixture proxy: one synchronous batch route is compared to the 50ms long-task threshold; browser PerformanceObserver remains release follow-up. Measurement blocker: Node fixture cannot observe browser main-thread long tasks. Required source artifact: Browser PerformanceObserver longtask trace captured during a live streaming turn.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Browser PerformanceObserver longtask trace captured during a live streaming turn.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy same-path burst fixture mirrors DebouncedState same-key replacement semantics. Measurement blocker: Current fixture mirrors debouncer semantics but does not read native file watcher runtime throughput. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic with raw event count and observation duration.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic with raw event count and observation duration.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy same-path burst fixture emits one debounced batch for one flush window. Measurement blocker: Current fixture emits one synthetic debounce batch but does not read native watcher emit cadence. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic with emitted batch count and observation duration.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic with emitted batch count and observation duration.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy same-path burst fixture: (rawCount - emittedCount) / rawCount. Measurement blocker: Current fixture uses a same-path synthetic burst; live watcher same-path replacement counts are not emitted. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic containing raw, replaced, and emitted same-path counts.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic containing raw, replaced, and emitted same-path counts.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy fixture matches external_changes_debouncer_no_empty_batch_emit regression contract. Measurement blocker: Current fixture verifies the no-empty-batch contract; runtime empty-batch diagnostics are not emitted. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic with empty batch emission count.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic with empty batch emission count.

performanceEvidence.reason: Measured workspace file listing command duration from .artifacts/realtime-runtime-diagnostics.json. surfaceId=initial-listing sampleCount=10
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Track for regression.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy event-loop stall probe sampled with setImmediate during async 10MB write+read fixture. Measurement blocker: Node setImmediate stall probe is not the Tauri async worker or WebView event-loop stall source. Required source artifact: Tauri/WebView file I/O diagnostic with event-loop stall samples during command execution.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Tauri/WebView file I/O diagnostic with event-loop stall samples during command execution.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy count of async fs operations in the fixture; native Tauri blocking-pool attribution remains release follow-up. Measurement blocker: Node fs operation count cannot attribute native Tauri blocking-pool calls. Required source artifact: Tauri backend diagnostic with blocking-pool call attribution for file commands.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Tauri backend diagnostic with blocking-pool call attribution for file commands.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy wall-time reused for the content-safe file I/O fixture; not a live Tauri command measurement. Measurement blocker: Node wall-time fixture is not a live Tauri command measurement during streaming. Required source artifact: Tauri command trace captured while a streaming turn is active.
performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Tauri command trace captured while a streaming turn is active.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy render-counter fixture using the same __profile.recordComponentRender hook wired by useLayoutNodes Profiler. performanceEvidence.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic for Composer renders during a live streaming minute.

performanceEvidence.reason: Proxy render-counter fixture using the same __profile.recordComponentRender hook wired by useLayoutNodes Profiler. bridgePayload.contentSafety: Metadata intentionally excludes absolute paths, prompts, assistant bodies, and tool output.

workspaceFileListingSummary.contentSafety: Diagnostics store hashes, counts, sourceVersion, and payload sizes; file contents and raw paths are excluded.

markdownPrecomputeSummary.unsafeHtmlBoundary: Worker output is not trusted DOM; rich React render and sanitization remain on the main renderer path.
markdownPrecomputeSummary.contentSafety: Diagnostics store source length/hash and structural counts; raw Markdown, prompt text, assistant body, tool output, and file content are excluded.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Node fixture proxy: one synchronous batch route is compared to the 50ms long-task threshold; browser PerformanceObserver remains release follow-up. Measurement blocker: Node fixture cannot observe browser main-thread long tasks. Required source artifact: Browser PerformanceObserver longtask trace captured during a live streaming turn.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Browser PerformanceObserver longtask trace captured during a live streaming turn.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy same-path burst fixture mirrors DebouncedState same-key replacement semantics. Measurement blocker: Current fixture mirrors debouncer semantics but does not read native file watcher runtime throughput. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic with raw event count and observation duration.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic with raw event count and observation duration.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy same-path burst fixture emits one debounced batch for one flush window. Measurement blocker: Current fixture emits one synthetic debounce batch but does not read native watcher emit cadence. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic with emitted batch count and observation duration.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic with emitted batch count and observation duration.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy same-path burst fixture: (rawCount - emittedCount) / rawCount. Measurement blocker: Current fixture uses a same-path synthetic burst; live watcher same-path replacement counts are not emitted. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic containing raw, replaced, and emitted same-path counts.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic containing raw, replaced, and emitted same-path counts.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy fixture matches external_changes_debouncer_no_empty_batch_emit regression contract. Measurement blocker: Current fixture verifies the no-empty-batch contract; runtime empty-batch diagnostics are not emitted. Required source artifact: Native file watcher diagnostic with empty batch emission count.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Native file watcher diagnostic with empty batch emission count.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Measured workspace file listing command duration from .artifacts/realtime-runtime-diagnostics.json. surfaceId=initial-listing sampleCount=10
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Track for regression.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy event-loop stall probe sampled with setImmediate during async 10MB write+read fixture. Measurement blocker: Node setImmediate stall probe is not the Tauri async worker or WebView event-loop stall source. Required source artifact: Tauri/WebView file I/O diagnostic with event-loop stall samples during command execution.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Tauri/WebView file I/O diagnostic with event-loop stall samples during command execution.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy count of async fs operations in the fixture; native Tauri blocking-pool attribution remains release follow-up. Measurement blocker: Node fs operation count cannot attribute native Tauri blocking-pool calls. Required source artifact: Tauri backend diagnostic with blocking-pool call attribution for file commands.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Tauri backend diagnostic with blocking-pool call attribution for file commands.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy wall-time reused for the content-safe file I/O fixture; not a live Tauri command measurement. Measurement blocker: Node wall-time fixture is not a live Tauri command measurement during streaming. Required source artifact: Tauri command trace captured while a streaming turn is active.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: Tauri command trace captured while a streaming turn is active.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy render-counter fixture using the same __profile.recordComponentRender hook wired by useLayoutNodes Profiler. Measurement blocker: Synthetic render-counter fixture is not a production React Profiler capture. Required source artifact: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic for Composer renders during a live streaming minute.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic for Composer renders during a live streaming minute.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy render-counter fixture using the same __profile.recordComponentRender hook wired by useLayoutNodes Profiler. Measurement blocker: Synthetic render-counter fixture is not a production React Profiler capture. Required source artifact: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic for sidebar renders during a live streaming minute.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic for sidebar renders during a live streaming minute.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy render-counter fixture; production row-level Profiler capture remains release follow-up. Measurement blocker: Synthetic render-counter fixture does not capture production row-level rerenders. Required source artifact: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic with thread-row render counts over a 1000-delta stream.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic with thread-row render counts over a 1000-delta stream.

realtimeTraceBudgets.reason: Proxy render-counter fixture; production layout recompute capture remains release follow-up. Measurement blocker: Synthetic render-counter fixture does not capture production layout-node recompute diagnostics. Required source artifact: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic with layout node recompute counts over a 1000-delta stream.
realtimeTraceBudgets.nextAction: Keep as regression baseline until available: React Profiler/runtime diagnostic with layout node recompute counts over a 1000-delta stream.
